testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify searching for a team
steps: Verification: Expect search results to be displayed

testCases.title: Verify pagination to page 10
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=10'

testCases.title: Verify navigating to the next page using the next button
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=13'
expected: The next page is loaded successfully

testCases.title: Verify navigating to the previous page using the previous button
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=11'
expected: The previous page is loaded successfully

testCases.title: Verify selecting the number of records per page
steps: Verification: Expect the options to be displayed
